text: Year of the World 3291, Year before Christ 713.; 4 Kings 18:13.; 2 Paralipomenon xxxii.
And. These four chapters are taken from 4 Kings xviii., etc., as a sort of explanation of what Isaias has been foretelling. (Calmet)<hr>An abridgment also occurs, 2 Paralipomenon xxxii.
Altar. Such is the blindness of infidels, that they confound what is done to destroy idols, with their worship. (Worthington)
